title: Sara opens notebook — MAGIC FOREST RESCUE PLAN
prompt: Tight close-up shot on the @beach-sunset sand. @Sara already seated cross-legged on a beach towel, the open @sara-notebook-rescue spread across her lap, a chunky purple crayon in her hand. The notebook page already shows the title 'MAGIC FOREST RESCUE PLAN' in big handwriting at the top with a small drawing of the glowing bottle next to it. Sara is mid-drawing — adding a small island shape and a dotted-line route from the bottle to the island, an X marking the spot. Sara (concentrating, tongue poking out): "Bottle here... island here... route... X marks the SPOT." She holds up the page admiring her own work. Sara (satisfied, to herself): "Nailed it." Soft golden sunset light from the right side, gentle wave sounds.
